title: Prepare one bounded R6 milestone proposal
summary: Convert one structured milestone-planning request into one bounded milestone proposal with durable lineage.

lineage.rationale: The operator requested one bounded milestone proposal from one structured intake inside R6.

work_object_refs.notes: The request targets one milestone only.

evidence.summary: The R6 milestone brief authorizes bounded milestone proposal generation only.

audit.notes: Request Brief fixture reviewed against the focused R6-002 proposal test.

request_intent: Prepare one bounded milestone proposal from one structured intake.
requested_outcome: Produce one milestone proposal with 6 proposed tasks, durable lineage, and no approval or dispatch behavior.
scope_constraints: No automatic resume or rollback behavior
operator_questions: Which milestone is this proposal for?
Which task sequence stays inside the supervised pilot boundary?
escalation_notes: Reject malformed or incomplete milestone proposal inputs rather than inferring missing task structure.

pipeline.notes: Request Brief remains bounded to the admin-only milestone planning substrate and does not imply Standard runtime.

scope.summary: Request Brief scope is limited to the admin-only control kernel, governed work objects, planning records, and request-brief surfaces.
scope.notes: The request surface remains planning-only and does not open runtime or orchestration claims.
